name: control mapping: compliance/controls.yaml entries match §2.9 schema {framework, control_id, satisfied_by[], legal_review_status}
command:
printf "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: pending
" > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-controls-yaml.sh" "$PWD/controls.yaml" && echo ok 1>&2
